cover.subtitle:
남침과 인천상륙,
3년의 동족상잔.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a wide gray map silhouette of the Korean peninsula with a thick red dashed arrow descending from the north and a blue arrow rising from Incheon (west coast) toward the center. Small soldier silhouettes (one in helmet on each side, profile view) facing each other across a low ridge. Background: smoke wisps rising from a distant city silhouette. Color: gray base + red southward arrow + blue Incheon landing arrow + small amber explosion accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 북한 남침, 사흘 만에 서울 함락.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 인천상륙(9.15)과 1.4 후퇴의 시간 순서, 흥남 철수의 의의, 한미상호방위조약 체결 시점이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small Korean peninsula silhouette with a thin red horizontal line at the middle. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
